body.body: Slate = named themed bundle of work (~1 day). DB node schema: name (str), theme (str), done_when (str), tickets[] (strong-edge children), adopted_bugs[] (weak-edge children), next_slate (sibling pointer with decay weight). Horizon cascade: slate 0 fully defined, slate 1 shape known, slate 2+ vague. Implement as PROCEDURAL node type with typed edges. slate.md becomes the rendered view of this node. Ref: D130.
body.title: Define slate as DB node: name/theme/tickets/done_when/horizon
body.result: slates table in Postgres (D132). slate_manager.py: seed/show/render/close-ticket/add-ticket/advance. Seeded slates 0-3. slate.md now rendered from DB.
